overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character in white robes exploring a sunlit historic Middle Eastern courtyard with stone architecture, red fabric canopies, and lush vegetation. The character walks through the ornate space, pauses to observe the surroundings, and continues exploring the detailed environment with decorative carpets and water features.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered courtyard with red fabric canopy

events.description: character walks up stone steps and enters the covered courtyard area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the courtyard beneath the red canopy toward the stone building entrance ahead

entered.detail: large red fabric canopy overhead supported by wooden pillars, providing shade
historic stone building with weathered beige walls and arched windows
thick wooden support pillars holding up the canopy structure
tall palm trees visible beyond the courtyard walls
ornate red and purple carpets and cushions scattered on the stone floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward through a historic courtyard covered by a red fabric canopy. Stone buildings with arched windows lie ahead while palm trees frame the entrance. Decorative carpets cover the stone tile floor as the character approaches the building facade.

events.description: character stops walking and stands still to observe the building entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: pauses in the center of the courtyard and looks toward the stone building entrance, surveying the surroundings

notable_agents.action: distant figure in dark clothing standing near the arched doorway of the building

entered.detail: decorative wooden lattice screens on the upper floors of the building
dark arched entranceway at the base of the stone building

segments.scene_description: The character pauses beneath the red canopy in the center of the courtyard, focusing on the stone building ahead. A distant figure stands near the arched doorway while the camera pans slightly to take in the wooden lattice windows and decorative architectural details.

events.description: character turns right and begins walking around the courtyard perimeter

agents.ego_description: turns right and walks along the courtyard perimeter, exploring the space and passing by a stone water feature

entered.detail: rectangular stone pool with water, bordered by low walls
stone archway bridge connecting buildings in the background
narrow stone walkway leading to other parts of the complex

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks along the courtyard perimeter, revealing a stone water feature and an archway bridge in the background. Moving away from the main building facade, the exploration continues under the shaded canopy with lush greenery visible around the stone pathways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic courtyard that shifts from a focused approach toward a building facade to a wider exploration of the surrounding architecture. It begins with the character walking forward under a red fabric canopy, passing over decorative carpets toward stone buildings with arched windows and framing palm trees. As the character pauses in the center of the courtyard, the camera pans slightly to highlight the wooden lattice windows and a distant figure standing near an arched doorway. The scene then shifts as the character turns to walk along the perimeter, moving away from the main facade to reveal a stone water feature and an archway bridge in the background. Finally, the movement continues under the shaded canopy, gliding past lush greenery and stone pathways.
